note: lap 3 - Leigh Aberdeen overtakes Kevin Zwemstra for p1
Zoomed to the front, no stunt or a jaunt!
Leigh Aberdeen zooms to the front and overtakes Kevin Zwemstra for p1 without a stunt or a jaunt.
intro: Racing drivers from around the world, prepare to take on the bends of Watkins Glen International, in this thrilling iFormula League heat. Buckle your seat belts as you speed through the Classic Boot circuit, at 15:00 on October 15th onward, for heated competition like never before. Let the engines roar as you challenge yourself and other drivers to be crowned the champion. Lets race!
